scripts.build:release: npm run build:linux && npm run build:win && rm -rf release && mkdir -p release/browsers && cp -r bin/browsers/* release/browsers/ && mv bin/app-linux release/whatsapp-api-linux && mv bin/app-win.exe release/whatsapp-api-win.exe && split -b 90M release/whatsapp-api-linux release/whatsapp-api-linux.part_ && rm release/whatsapp-api-linux && split -b 90M release/whatsapp-api-win.exe release/whatsapp-api-win.exe.part_ && rm release/whatsapp-api-win.exe && split -b 90M release/browsers/linux/chrome release/browsers/linux/chrome.part_ && rm release/browsers/linux/chrome && split -b 90M release/browsers/win/chrome.dll release/browsers/win/chrome.dll.part_ && rm release/browsers/win/chrome.dll && cp restore.sh release/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp restore.bat release/ 2>/dev/null || true
